description: Create Agent Dock UI components in packages/shared-ui/src/agent/: AgentDock, AgentCard, ApprovalDialog, AgentTimeline, AgentCreator, AgentMiniWidget. These React components provide the user-facing interface for the agent swarm system.
steps: Create packages/shared-ui/src/agent/AgentDock.tsx - Bottom sheet (mobile) / side panel (desktop) showing all running agents. Props: agents[], onAgentSelect, isOpen, onClose. Renders list of AgentCards. Responsive layout.
Create packages/shared-ui/src/agent/AgentCard.tsx - Per-agent card showing: icon, name, status badge, progress bar, current action text, pause/stop buttons. Props: agent, onPause, onStop, onResume.

Create packages/shared-ui/src/agent/ApprovalDialog.tsx - Modal popup for permission requests. Shows: agent name, requested action, risk level, approve/reject buttons, timeout countdown. Props: request, onApprove, onReject.
Create packages/shared-ui/src/agent/AgentTimeline.tsx - Full-day audit timeline with undo button per reversible action. Props: entries[], onUndo. Renders chronological list with timestamps.
Create packages/shared-ui/src/agent/AgentCreator.tsx - Natural language input to create custom agent config. Props: onSubmit, existingAgents[]. Has text input, permission selector, and preview.
Create packages/shared-ui/src/agent/AgentMiniWidget.tsx - Floating widget showing running agent count and overall status. Props: runningCount, hasApprovalsPending, onClick.
Create packages/shared-ui/src/agent/index.ts - Barrel exports for all agent UI components.
Update packages/shared-ui/src/index.ts - Add exports from './agent' barrel.
Create packages/shared-ui/src/__tests__/agent-components.test.tsx - Test all 6 agent UI components: rendering, interactions, prop handling. Follow pattern from existing components.test.tsx.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 React components render without errors
AgentDock shows list of agents with cards
ApprovalDialog renders approve/reject buttons and handles clicks
AgentTimeline renders entries with undo buttons for reversible actions
All tests pass with NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run
findings: Tests must be run with --config packages/shared-ui/vitest.config.ts from root to pick up jsdom environment. Pre-existing TS errors in src/advanced/ directory do not affect agent components. Prettier formats on commit via lint-staged. Must use NODE_OPTIONS="" for git commit hooks.
